title: Marriage Is a Private Affair
writer: David Hertz, Lenore J. Coffee, Judith Kelly
actors: Lana Turner, James Craig, John Hodiak
plot: Theo has had many boyfriends who wanted to marry her. Since her mother, Mrs. Selworth, has been married many times, Theo is unsure of commitment. Without much thought, she finally accepts the proposal of Air Corps Lieutenant Tom W...
